name: Metalyst Forgings Limited
summary: Metalyst Forgings Limited manufactures and sells forged automotive components primarily in India. It has a product portfolio with a range of engineered components, including camshafts, connecting rods, crankshaft, crown wheel pinions, and front axle beams. The company provides components for two/three wheelers, passenger cars, tractors, light commercial vehicles (LCV), heavy commercial vehicles (HCV), and stationary engines. In addition, it exports its products. The company was formerly known as Ahmednagar Forgings Limited and changed its name to Metalyst Forgings Limited in May 2015. Metalyst Forgings Limited was founded in 1977 and is based in Pune, India. Metalyst Forgings Limited operates as a subsidiary of Amtek Auto Ltd.
